title: Hot Crab Cups
instructions:
Place the phyllo cups on a baking sheet or a mini muffin pan.
In a medium bowl, mix the cream cheese, sour cream, lemon juice, crab, mozzarella and Old Bay until well combined.
Fill the cups with the crab mixture and sprinkle with the parmesan cheese.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the tops begin to brown.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with the chives.
Serve warm.
